rationale: The code faithfully and cleanly implements Task 4a. The closed inventory is exact and includes the AM-40 package classification. The shared D33 module-load classifier and relative-specifier resolver are elegantly combined in `util.mjs` and proven to be consumed by the closure derivation. The code weaver's knowledge graph extraction and the git weaver's path-scoped deterministic execution cleanly enforce the D5 counted-source iteration invariants via the `makeCountedSource` generator block. Physical containment correctly avoids TOCTOU edge cases by prohibiting any symlink component in the lstat pass prior to realpath resolution. All artifacts run hermetically with zero external dependencies and zero scope creep.
